selectionPolicy.purpose: Resolve high-risk terminology, ICU grammar, validation semantics, dynamic fallbacks, numerical diagnostics, and review workflow language before bulk translation.
selectionPolicy.approvalAuthority: One ignored local Markdown confirmation covering product context, native German, and German-capable LCA/TIDAS dimensions; the same person may confirm all three

hardDecisionPoints: Startdatensatz for a TIDAS dependency-closure root record
Startprozess for a path-analysis root process
Impact-Ready as the product policy term
Inputs und Outputs for the exchange-table tab

messages.rationale: Preserves the life-cycle-model data-set type and avoids implying a complete Ökobilanz study.
messages.risk: Lebenszyklusmodell must stay distinct from the assessment concept Ökobilanz.

messages.rationale: Names the ILCD flow-property fields rather than generic properties.
messages.risk: Must not be shortened to Eigenschaften.

messages.rationale: Uses established German LCA/ILCD terminology.
messages.risk: Must remain distinct from Referenzfluss and funktionelle Einheit.

messages.rationale: Names the reference flow in the graphical model context.
messages.risk: Chinese 基准流 must not lead to Basisfluss.

messages.rationale: Uses the same ILCD concept consistently for a process exchange.
messages.risk: All occurrences of the concept must remain aligned.

messages.rationale: Uses a recognizable compact German LCA software label for the exchange table.
messages.risk: This compact tab label must remain distinct from the individual Austausch entity term.

messages.rationale: Retains the established acronym and identifies the results surface.
messages.risk: Must not be generalized to Umweltergebnisse.

messages.rationale: Expands LCI using the established German LCA phase name.
messages.risk: Must align with compact surfaces that may retain LCI.

messages.rationale: Describes quantitative product or process properties without substituting functional unit.
messages.risk: Narrow ILCD field meaning requires domain confirmation.

messages.rationale: Uses the established German LCA flow type.
messages.risk: Must not follow Chinese 基础流 into Basisfluss.

messages.rationale: Uses the established flow type.
messages.risk: Must remain distinct from the Product entity.

messages.rationale: Uses a direct flow-type compound.
messages.risk: Abfallstrom may imply a logistics stream and needs domain review if preferred.

messages.rationale: Preserves the source percentage qualifier and unit.
messages.risk: Must not invent a confidence-interval interpretation.

messages.rationale: Uses the selected noun-label style for standalone distribution options: Nicht definiert, Lognormalverteilung, Normalverteilung, Dreiecksverteilung, and Gleichverteilung.
messages.risk: All Flow, Process, and Life Cycle Model option families must use the same noun style during full translation.

messages.rationale: Represents sub-locations within operation, supply, or production geography.
messages.risk: Teilstandort vs. Unterstandort requires ILCD review.

messages.rationale: Preserves both description and the data-quality dimension.
messages.risk: Must not collapse to Zeitraum.

messages.rationale: Interprets treatment as treatment of data rather than material treatment.
messages.risk: Datenaufbereitung vs. Datenbehandlung must be standardized.

messages.rationale: Keeps this image type distinct from a diagram or picture.
messages.risk: Must not be merged into Technologiediagramm.

messages.rationale: Names diagrams or pictures separately from the technology pictogram field.
messages.risk: Flussdiagramm could be confused with a flow-entity graph.

messages.rationale: Preserves the paired ILCD naming dimensions.
messages.risk: Whether Mix remains an English domain term requires review.

messages.candidate: {count, plural, one {# Benutzerdatensatz mit Konflikt} other {# Benutzerdatensätze mit Konflikten}}
messages.rationale: Uses the same Konflikt term as the import summary while preserving the ICU count branches.
messages.risk: Must not imply that the conflicting records were overwritten, deleted, or imported.

messages.candidate: {count, plural, one {# Open-Data-Datensatz übersprungen} other {# Open-Data-Datensätze übersprungen}}
messages.rationale: States that records are skipped rather than deleted and uses the Open Data product-scope name as a compound modifier.
messages.risk: Open-Data-Datensatz and the standalone product label Open Data must remain consistent.

messages.candidate: Gesamt: {total}, übersprungene Open-Data-Datensätze: {filtered}, Konflikte bei Benutzerdaten: {conflicts}, importiert: {imported}
messages.rationale: Preserves all four import counters; the backend filtered count is specifically the Open Data records excluded from insertion and therefore skipped.
messages.risk: Must not imply that filtered records were deleted or imported into the user's data space.

messages.rationale: Uses a compact error-type label.
messages.risk: Klassifikation must remain distinct from Kategorisierung.

messages.rationale: Names the mismatch between the TIDAS localized-text language tag and the actual text content in a compact validation-issue label.
messages.risk: Must not be understood as a mismatch between the application UI locale and the browser locale.

messages.rationale: Uses a natural complete label for imported data that does not conform to the expected TIDAS schema.
messages.risk: Must identify structural schema non-conformance and must not imply a form-layout or network error.

messages.candidate: Die Validierung hat den Import blockiert. Fehler: {errors}, Warnungen: {warnings}, Probleme insgesamt: {issues}.
messages.rationale: Preserves the blocking consequence and all counters.
messages.risk: The containment relationship among issues, errors, and warnings must remain accurate.

messages.candidate: Laden Sie die vollständigen Details herunter, um Dateipfade, Fundstellen und den Validierungskontext zu prüfen.
messages.rationale: Uses formal address and explains why the report is useful.
messages.risk: Fundstellen must match the actual report location data.

messages.rationale: Names user-selected starting data sets whose dependency closures are packaged.
messages.risk: Must remain distinct from process-analysis Startprozess and from output semantics.

messages.rationale: Uses the selected singular term for one package dependency starting record.
messages.risk: Must share Startdatensatz with every TIDAS root-record count label.

messages.rationale: Preserves ICU number agreement for root records.
messages.risk: The selected Startdatensatz term remains subject to local Pilot confirmation.

messages.rationale: Provides a compact scope label; current_user is always resolved from the authenticated caller rather than an impersonated target user.
messages.risk: If the product later adds administrator impersonation, this context must be reviewed again.

messages.candidate: Nur für (nahezu) reine Stoffe angeben, nicht für den Hauptbestandteil eines Materials oder Produkts.
messages.rationale: Provides complete, neutral guidance on when the CAS field applies.
messages.risk: The chemical applicability rule requires domain confirmation.

messages.candidate: Geben Sie eine gültige CAS-Nummer ein: 2–7 Ziffern, ein Bindestrich, 2 Ziffern, ein Bindestrich und 1 Prüfziffer.
messages.rationale: Mirrors the validated identifier structure.
messages.risk: Digit ranges and checksum wording must match implementation.

messages.candidate: Das Versionsformat muss XX.XX.XXX sein, wobei X jeweils für eine Ziffer steht.
messages.rationale: Explains the fixed version pattern without localizing separators.
messages.risk: The displayed format must match the actual validator.

messages.rationale: Preserves the data-content language requirement despite a German UI.
messages.risk: Must never be changed to require German data content.

messages.candidate: Speichern fehlgeschlagen. In folgenden Feldern fehlt die englische Fassung: {fields}.
messages.rationale: Makes clear that data fields lack an English variant.
messages.risk: The {fields} placeholder must remain intact.

messages.candidate: Speichern fehlgeschlagen. In folgenden Feldern fehlt die englische Fassung: {fields}; außerdem {count, plural, one {# weiteres Feld} other {# weitere Felder}}.
messages.rationale: Preserves both the displayed field list and additional count with German number agreement.
messages.risk: Nested information and both arguments must remain intact.

messages.candidate: Pflichtfeld: Füllen Sie dieses Feld aus, um Vollständigkeit und Konformität des Datensatzes sicherzustellen.
messages.rationale: Distinguishes a mandatory field from recommended and optional fields and uses the approved Konformität concept.
messages.risk: Must keep automated Validierung, human Prüfung, and formal Konformität distinct.

messages.candidate: Empfohlen: Füllen Sie dieses Feld aus, um Detailgrad und Nutzbarkeit der Daten zu verbessern.
messages.rationale: Does not imply that an empty recommended field blocks saving.
messages.risk: Detailgrad vs. Datenqualität must reflect the actual scoring model.

messages.candidate: Optional: Ergänzende Angaben; die Vollständigkeitsbewertung wird dadurch nicht beeinflusst.
messages.rationale: States the intended non-blocking effect.
messages.risk: The asserted scoring consequence must be verified in product behavior.

messages.candidate: Genau eine Flusseigenschaft muss als quantitative Referenz festgelegt werden.
messages.rationale: Names the validated object and uniqueness rule.
messages.risk: Quantitative Referenz must stay distinct from Referenzfluss.

messages.candidate: Wählen Sie genau einen Austausch als quantitative Referenz aus.
messages.rationale: Names the exchange-list object in the callsite context.
messages.risk: Must confirm that each selectable row is truly an Austausch.

messages.candidate: Genau eine Einheit muss als quantitative Referenz festgelegt werden.
messages.rationale: Preserves the one-unit constraint in a unit group.
messages.risk: Must not substitute Referenzeinheit if that is a different concept.

messages.candidate: Wählen Sie genau einen Eintrag als quantitative Referenz aus.
messages.rationale: Keeps the generic SDK suggestion independent of entity type.
messages.risk: Eintrag vs. Element requires product review.

messages.candidate: Englischer Text darf keine chinesischen Schriftzeichen enthalten.
messages.rationale: Preserves the data-language rule, not the UI locale.
messages.risk: German UI must not alter the existing English/Chinese content-language contract.

messages.candidate: Chinesischer Text muss mindestens ein chinesisches Schriftzeichen enthalten.
messages.rationale: Preserves the at-least-one-character validation constraint.
messages.risk: German UI must not alter the existing Chinese content-language contract.

messages.candidate: Der Berechnungsnachweis fehlt oder ist ungültig.
messages.rationale: Uses Nachweis for verifiable calculation evidence.
messages.risk: Evidenz vs. Nachweis needs one product-domain decision.

messages.candidate: Es wurden widersprüchliche Nachweise zur Methodenabdeckung bereitgestellt.
messages.rationale: Expresses conflicting evidence sources for method coverage.
messages.risk: Coverage means method coverage, not test coverage.

messages.candidate: Der Berechnungsnachweis im alten Format belegt keine vollständige Abdeckung auf Methodenebene.
messages.rationale: Explains legacy evidence without blindly exposing an internal enum.
messages.risk: Operations may require the v1 identifier to remain visible.

messages.candidate: Die Abdeckung auf Methodenebene fehlt oder stimmt nicht mit der geprüften Quelle überein.
messages.rationale: Preserves both failure alternatives.
messages.risk: Reviewed source is not a human reviewer and must not be worded that way.

messages.candidate: Der Berechnungsnachweis wurde nicht erfolgreich validiert.
messages.rationale: Uses the native-reviewed passive validation phrasing for a generic evidence failure without inventing a cause.
messages.risk: Must remain a generic fallback and must not imply a more specific failure reason.

messages.rationale: Covers both legacy and unverified source states.
messages.risk: Worker must be confirmed as a retained product component name.

messages.rationale: Names the reviewed static method bundle and preserves its version.
messages.risk: The {version} placeholder is immutable.

messages.rationale: Uses a neutral localized fallback label.
messages.risk: None beyond context fit.

messages.rationale: Distinguishes a worker-provided method bundle from the static bundle.
messages.risk: Worker naming and {version} must remain stable.

messages.rationale: Specifies calculation failure rather than a loading failure.
messages.risk: None beyond UI role.

messages.rationale: Describes evidence or coverage completeness.
messages.risk: Must not be mistaken for task completion.

messages.rationale: Makes the covered object explicit.
messages.risk: May be too narrow if coverage also includes data-set scope.

messages.rationale: Uses the compact native-reviewed status-label variant because the value appears in an Alert tag and the adjacent reason explains the exact mismatch.
messages.risk: Must cover the fail-closed source-drift family without overclaiming one specific comparison failure.

messages.candidate: {selectedCount, plural, one {# Prozess ausgewählt ({totalCount, plural, one {# Option verfügbar} other {# Optionen verfügbar}}).} other {# Prozesse ausgewählt ({totalCount, plural, one {# Option verfügbar} other {# Optionen verfügbar}}).}}
messages.rationale: Preserves both nested counts while avoiding case problems around a numeric placeholder.
messages.risk: Both ICU plural layers and arguments must remain intact.

messages.candidate: {selectedCount, plural, one {# Startprozess ausgewählt ({totalCount, plural, one {# Option verfügbar} other {# Optionen verfügbar}}).} other {# Startprozesse ausgewählt ({totalCount, plural, one {# Option verfügbar} other {# Optionen verfügbar}}).}}
messages.rationale: Names selected root processes as starting processes and preserves nested ICU.
messages.risk: Startprozess vs. Wurzelprozess requires graph/LCA product review.

messages.candidate: Keine Prozesse entsprechen dem aktuellen Datenbereich und dem Suchbegriff.
messages.rationale: Preserves both data-scope and search-filter conditions.
messages.risk: Datenbereich vs. Datenumfang must align with the scope control.

messages.rationale: Names the cross-domain semantic mismatch directly.
messages.risk: LCIA and Fluss terminology must remain precise.

messages.candidate: Produktflüsse, Elementarflüsse, Biosphärenaustausche oder LCIA-Charakterisierungsfaktoren sind semantisch inkonsistent zugeordnet.
messages.rationale: Preserves all four object types and the mapping failure.
messages.risk: Biosphärenaustausch and Charakterisierungsfaktor require domain approval.

messages.candidate: Prüfen Sie Flusstypen, Biosphärenaustausche und die Zuordnung der LCIA-Charakterisierungsfaktoren. Korrigieren Sie die inkonsistenten Daten und versuchen Sie es erneut.
messages.rationale: Turns the diagnostic into two actionable recovery steps.
messages.risk: Zuordnung must not imply unit conversion.

messages.rationale: Uses a concise numerical diagnostic title.
messages.risk: These are numerical columns, not only visible table columns.

messages.candidate: Die Matrix M = I − A enthält identische dünn besetzte Spalten. Dadurch kann das Gleichungssystem unterbestimmt oder linear abhängig sein.
messages.rationale: Preserves sparse-matrix structure and possible mathematical consequences.
messages.risk: Under-determined and linear-dependence claims require numerical review.

messages.candidate: Prüfen Sie doppelte Prozesse, wiederholte Austauschstrukturen und linear abhängige Prozesse. Korrigieren Sie die Daten und versuchen Sie es erneut.
messages.rationale: Names the three intended investigation targets.
messages.risk: Austauschstruktur terminology requires LCA review.

messages.rationale: Keeps the diagnostic title concise while the adjacent description identifies the matrix-factorization test.
messages.risk: Must not lose the numerical-probe meaning or duplicate detail already present in the description.

messages.candidate: Der schnelle Test der Matrixfaktorisierung konnte nicht zuverlässig abgeschlossen werden. Dies weist auf eine riskante Berechnungsstruktur hin.
messages.rationale: Preserves uncertainty and risk without claiming proven unsolvability.
messages.risk: Must not overstate the numerical conclusion.

messages.candidate: Prüfen Sie den Austauschgraphen, die quantitativen Referenzen und die Schleifenstruktur um den Zielprozess. Reichen Sie anschließend erneut zur Prüfung ein.
messages.rationale: Preserves all investigation targets and the resubmission step.
messages.risk: Austauschgraph and Schleifenstruktur require LCA/solver approval.

messages.rationale: Names the missing factors precisely.
messages.risk: Must not collapse to generic Wirkungsfaktoren.

messages.candidate: Für diese Einreichung zur Prüfung sind Impact-Ready-Daten erforderlich; es sind jedoch keine LCIA-Charakterisierungsfaktoren verfügbar.
messages.rationale: Preserves the product policy term Impact-Ready and states that its required LCIA factors are unavailable.
messages.risk: The product term must remain hyphenated and distinct from the LCIA phase name Wirkungsabschätzung.

messages.candidate: Fügen Sie die erforderlichen LCIA-Charakterisierungsfaktoren hinzu oder prüfen Sie, ob die Impact-Ready-Anforderung für diese Einreichung deaktiviert werden soll.
messages.rationale: Preserves both recovery options: add data or change the policy.
messages.risk: Must not invent the compound Wirkungsabschätzungsbereitschaft or omit the policy-disable option.

messages.candidate: Quantitative Referenz fehlt oder ist null
messages.rationale: Preserves missing and numeric-zero alternatives.
messages.risk: null means numeric zero here, not a programming null value.

messages.candidate: Dem Prozess fehlt eine gültige quantitative Referenz; alternativ verweist sie auf einen nicht vorhandenen Austausch oder ihre Referenzmenge ist null.
messages.rationale: Preserves all three failure branches.
messages.risk: Referenzmenge requires terminology review.

messages.candidate: Prüfen Sie die quantitative Referenz. Sie muss auf einen gültigen Austausch mit einer Menge größer als null verweisen.
messages.rationale: States the actual corrective condition.
messages.risk: Austausch and Menge must match the data model.

messages.candidate: Matrixdiagonale ist null oder nahezu null
messages.rationale: Preserves exact-zero and near-zero conditions.
messages.risk: No threshold may be invented.

messages.candidate: Die erzeugte Matrix M = I − A hat auf der Diagonale Werte von null oder nahezu null. Dadurch kann die Lösung instabil sein oder fehlschlagen.
messages.rationale: Preserves the diagonal condition without incorrectly limiting it to exactly one entry, then states the possible solver consequence.
messages.risk: Must not invent a numeric near-zero threshold.

messages.candidate: Prüfen Sie Eigenschleifen, quantitative Referenzen, Referenzaustausche und die Prozessstruktur, bevor Sie erneut einreichen.
messages.rationale: Preserves every intended investigation target.
messages.risk: Eigenschleife and Referenzaustausch need LCA/solver review.

messages.candidate: Berechnung des Zielprozesses liefert kein endliches Ergebnis
messages.rationale: Uses natural technical German while preserving the non-finite solve-result condition for the target process.
messages.risk: The full-width diagnostic title must wrap without clipping and must remain paired with the NaN/Infinity explanation.

messages.candidate: Der Test für den Zielprozess ist während der Berechnung fehlgeschlagen oder hat NaN- bzw. Infinity-Werte erzeugt.
messages.rationale: Preserves solve failure, NaN, and infinity outcomes.
messages.risk: NaN and Infinity remain exact technical diagnostic tokens.

messages.candidate: Prüfen Sie die zugehörigen Flüsse, Austauschmengen, LCIA-Daten und die Matrixstruktur. Korrigieren Sie anschließend die Daten, die nicht endliche Ergebnisse verursachen.
messages.rationale: Preserves investigation objects and corrective action.
messages.risk: Austauschmenge and non-finite wording need LCA/solver approval.

messages.rationale: Uses a complete completed-event sentence because this message appears in the review log's action-details column rather than on an assignment control.
messages.risk: Must not be mistaken for the separate assignment button command. A 390px actual-component sample also places the current review-log action column outside the visible table area; #602 must resolve the responsive layout before activation.

messages.rationale: Treats the source as a completed review-log event without assuming that the assignment contained exactly one reviewer.
messages.risk: Must remain distinct from a revoke button and from the separate reviewer-rejected event.

messages.rationale: Describes the completed final-review event that releases associated data while remaining distinct from the separate approval control.
messages.risk: Must not imply that the review record itself is public or assume exactly one associated data set.

messages.rationale: Forms the completed review-log event pair with Prüfung freigegeben.
messages.risk: Must remain distinct from the separate rejection control.

messages.rationale: Uses completed-event voice for the review-log action while retaining the comments concept.
messages.risk: Must remain aligned with the actual logged review payload. A 390px actual-component sample also places the current review-log action column outside the visible table area; #602 must resolve the responsive layout before activation.

messages.rationale: Localizes the fallback while retaining the unknown backend value as interpolation data.
messages.risk: The {action} placeholder must never become a computed message id.
